creator: stylish@shaw.ca
text:
The X server blanks the monitor when dri is enabled. It's a fairly new
relase with the latest ports hiearchy giving me xorg-7.2. The X server works
fine without the dri option. The video card is a radeon 7500 AGP with 64 mb
of ram. The drm is built in my kernel. I am not too sure what the problem
is. I thought it might be the BusID becouse i have 2 gfx cards in my
computer. The radeon on agp and a onboard agp sis.however it doest seem
to work any better with any of the options i have in the xorg.conf.

How-To-Repeat: Enable dri with a radeon 7500 in xorg-7.2.
